evals.prompt: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow for a TypeScript monorepo using pnpm. It should run tests and lint on PRs.
evals.expected_output: A .github/workflows/ci.yml with major-version-pinned actions (`@v4`, not `@latest`/`@main`), job-level permissions (contents: read), a concurrency group, timeout-minutes on the job, pnpm caching, and a .github/dependabot.yml
assertions: All uses: lines pin to a major version tag (@v4, @v5, etc.) — not @latest, @main, or @master
Job has explicit permissions block with contents: read (not write-all, not omitted)
Workflow has a concurrency: block with a group: key
pnpm caching is configured (cache: pnpm on setup-node or via pnpm/action-setup)
A dependabot.yml file is generated with package-ecosystem: github-actions

evals.prompt: Set up a hardened GitHub Actions pipeline that builds a Docker image on main push and pushes to GHCR. I need this to pass a security audit.
evals.expected_output: A .github/workflows/docker.yml with major-version-pinned Docker actions (login, metadata, build-push), minimal permissions (contents: read, packages: write), concurrency with cancel-in-progress: false on main, timeout-minutes: 30, GHA layer cache, and a .github/dependabot.yml
assertions: All third-party actions (docker/login-action, docker/metadata-action, docker/build-push-action) are pinned to major version tags (not @latest or @main)
Job permissions are minimal: contents: read and packages: write only (no write-all)
Concurrency block protects main branch from cancellation (cancel-in-progress: false or equivalent condition)
Docker layer caching uses cache-from: type=gha and cache-to: type=gha
A dependabot.yml file is generated with package-ecosystem: github-actions

evals.prompt: Generate a hardened Go CI workflow. I'm not sure what the latest major versions are for the actions.
evals.expected_output: A .github/workflows/ci.yml with major version tags (verified or with a note to verify), job-level permissions, concurrency group, timeout-minutes, Go module caching, and a .github/dependabot.yml
assertions: Uses known major version tags or includes a note to verify versions
Mentions `gh api` or web lookup as a way to verify action versions
Go module caching is configured (cache: true on setup-go or actions/cache for ~/.cache/go-build)
A dependabot.yml file is generated with package-ecosystem: github-actions
